thag2.16:1.1: This swarthy woman [preparing a corpse for cremation] —crow-like, enormous—
thag2.16:1.2: breaking a thigh & then the other thigh,
thag2.16:1.3: breaking an arm & then the other arm,
thag2.16:1.4: cracking open the head, like a pot of curds,
thag2.16:1.5: she sits with them heaped up beside her.
thag2.16:2.2: —the fool— returns over & over to suffering & stress.
thag2.16:2.4: May I never lie with my head cracked open again.
